summary: Verified GET /products pagination end-to-end. Backend: 46/46 pytest passing across 4 files (test_products_pagination.py 12, test_authz_ssrf_ratelimit.py 21, test_inquiries_legacy_email_fix.py 6, test_inquiries_price_security.py 7). Frontend /catalog: 24-cards default, Load More flows through 24->48->72->96->120->128 with exactly one +24 delta per click and zero duplicate data-testids; load-more-btn hides once total is reached; rapid double-click yields +24 only (guard/dedupe works). Filter reset verified via search->clear round-trip returning to 'Showing 24 of 128 pieces'. Compatibility smoke: Home renders featured section via ?featured=true&limit=48 (8 cards). /catalogue?print=1 renders 130 imgs via listAllProducts paging (?page=1..3&limit=48). /admin (test_admin_session cookie) dashboard shows PRODUCTS=139 confirming drafts visible via ?include_drafts=1&limit=5000&page=1. Zero React console errors on any tested route.

highlights: test_admin_pagination_includes_drafts_when_requested — admin cookie limit=500 respected, draft visible
test_pagination_page_2_returns_different_items — page 1 and page 2 id sets disjoint
test_pagination_never_exposes_drafts_to_public — walked all pages with include_drafts=1&status=draft, draft never leaked
test_category_filter_narrows_results, test_search_q_matches_name_or_sku, test_price_range_filter, test_sort_price_asc_and_desc — filters intact

test_inquiries_legacy_email_fix.result: 6/6 passed (after backend restart to clear POST /inquiries rate-limit bucket)

frontend_tests.catalog_initial_load: PASS — 24 product-card testids, results-count='Showing 24 of 128 pieces', load-more-btn visible
frontend_tests.catalog_load_more_sequential: PASS — 6 network requests (page=1..6, limit=24), cards grow 24->48->72->96->120->128, unique ids all rounds, load-more hides at 128
frontend_tests.catalog_load_more_rapid_double_click: PASS — double-click before response fires only produces +24 (dedupe in setProducts merge prevents duplicates); no duplicate data-testids in DOM
frontend_tests.catalog_filter_reset_search: PASS — after loading 48 cards, clearing search returns state to 'Showing 24 of 128 pieces' with 24 cards (proves setPage(1) reset ran)
frontend_tests.catalogue_pdf_full_list: PASS — /catalogue?print=1 uses listAllProducts to page /api/products?page=1..3&limit=48, 130 imgs render
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard_with_drafts: PASS — with cookie session_token=test_admin_session, /admin renders 'PRODUCTS 139' (128 public + 11 drafts); network shows single /api/products?include_drafts=1&limit=5000&page=1

critical_code_review_comments: Catalog.jsx loadMore(): the requestKeyRef is only INCREMENTED in the filter effect, not in loadMore. During a rapid double-click, both handlers read the same page state and compute nextPage=page+1, so both fire the same page request. Correctness is preserved by the setProducts dedupe (id-based Set), so the observable outcome is +24 with no duplicates. Behavior is correct today; a stricter fix would be an inFlightRef guard to actually suppress the second request. Not a bug for this iteration.
server.py GET /products: public_cap=48 and admin_cap=5000 hard-coded — fine per spec. Consider moving to constants at module top for reuse if new callers need different ceilings.

Frontend network trace on / (Home) fires listAllProducts (paging page=1..3&limit=48) in addition to featured — likely from a compatibility helper (e.g., AtelierShowcase or a picker). It works, but it's 3 requests for the same data pool per home visit; may be worth caching if home load latency matters.
test_products_pagination.py::test_price_range_filter has an unused dead-code line `assert r['status_code'] if False else True` (line 144) — harmless smoke placeholder, safe to remove.
test_credentials: Admin: cookie session_token=test_admin_session, email raks.agarwal325@gmail.com (must be in ADMIN_EMAILS). Seed via mongosh on DB test_database (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Add header X-Requested-With: fetch on writes.
seed_data_creation: test_products_pagination.py module fixture upserts user_test + test_admin_session on test_database automatically. Draft products TEST_pagi_draft_* and TEST_admin_draft_* inserted then cleaned per-test via mongosh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limit on POST /inquiries is still 10/300s per IP (in-memory bucket). If running the 4 backend files together in parallel via pytest-xdist within 5 min, the inquiries suites hit 429; run them sequentially (-o addopts='') or `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` between runs. DB_NAME is test_database. Frontend /catalog uses PAGE_SIZE=24; total is 128 published + 11 drafts (=139 admin view) as of this iteration.
